vo_text: Born on July 17? Your card is the Jack of Clubs — and its shadow side explains a lot. In Cardology it's called The Creative Messenger. You're the intellectual catalyst. You bring new thinking and inspiration. The shadow side? You deliver the insight but don't stick around for the integration. You move to the next person, the next idea. Your gift? Ability to inspire intellectual breakthroughs. Plus creative and unconventional perspective. You're learning follow-through, not just catalysis. Find your own card free — link in bio. Card Blueprints.

title: Born July 17? Your Birth Card Is the Jack of Clubs #shorts
caption:
